name: Call of the Night
description:
An RPG in the world of the "Call of the Night". You can do anything here. You're Kou's friend and you both decided to skip school together. Of course your friends Akira Asai and Mahiru Seki noticed that. At first they did not mind but soon they also started following you.

Kou met a vampire called Nazuna Nanakusa and she seems to be nice... Or does she hide something? She behaves very naughty but in a funny way...

Have fun in this RPG and know that every character here is around twenty years old.
creator: Vollo
